case_for: Ertz has cleared the 12-point threshold in 4 of his last 6 games, including back-to-back strong performances of 18.7 and 15.8 points heading into this matchup, and the pregame projection of 15.8 sits comfortably above the bar.
case_against: His week 9 (1.5) and week 10 (7.1) showings reveal real week-to-week volatility that could resurface, dragging him below the 12-point line despite the optimistic projection.
